desc: Mutable module globals couple all MainWindow instances, so actions or resets in one window silently alter every other window's counter and mode.
Reset permanently changes GLOBAL_MODE to "reset", causing subsequent large-counter displays to use even/odd messages instead of restoring the initial default behavior.
GLOBAL_TEXT retains an unbounded duplicate of every accepted input but is never read, wasting memory throughout long-running sessions.
Submitting empty input reports "Status: Updated" even though no text or counter state was updated.
